Legendary Skill.name: 传奇技能 Legendary Skill
Legendary Skill.description:
你训练你的艾达兽，使其在你选择的一项技能上成为真正的传奇。选择一项技能。你所有将所选技能作为艾达兽技能的艾达兽，都将该技能的熟练度等级从大师提升为传奇。如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.YiWDPrJu3OAFrnTI]{Focused Training} 专长，并且你选择的技能与该专长中的某个专注训练相关联，则所有拥有该专注训练的艾达兽会根据你所选择的技能获得一个额外的技能专长：

  • 杂技：你灵巧的艾达兽获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.gBSPbQRXdagZTUwY]{Kip Up} 技能专长。
  • 运动：你强壮的艾达兽获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.P04Hw8E6WAWARKHP]{Quick Climb} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.bFoh3267kNLk68cU]{Quick Swim} 技能专长（为每只强壮的艾达兽分别选择）。
  • 威吓：你可怕的艾达兽获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.dc8X2Mbtwq6kGp7F]{Terrified Retreat} 技能专长。
  • 表演：你引人入胜的艾达兽获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.4UXyMtXLaOxuH6Js]{Distracting Performance} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.lFwfUvH2708rl6i3]{Virtuosic Performer} 技能专长。
  • 隐匿：你鬼祟的艾达兽获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Imvu2RV2ggjJ2HZt]{Swift Sneak} 技能专长。
  • 生存（技能）：你自给自足的艾达兽获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Yj4mpROEjdCjQzMd]{Planar Survival} 技能专长。
  • 盗窃：你擅盗的艾达兽获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.IZbjUaZI5zHTd1Vp]{Legendary Thief} 技能专长。

注：将 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.OWVCH0M6XbQnK7mB]{Legendary Skill (Eldamon)} 特性放到每只拥有所选技能的艾达兽上。

You train your eldamon to become true legends in a skill of your choice. Choose a skill. All your eldamon with the chosen skill as an eldamon skill increase their proficiency rank in that skill from master to legendary. If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.YiWDPrJu3OAFrnTI]{Focused Training} feat and you choose a skill associated with one of the focused trainings from that feat, all your eldamon with that focused training gain an additional skill feat depending on the skill you chose:

  • Acrobatics: Your nimble eldamon gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.gBSPbQRXdagZTUwY]{Kip Up} skill feat.
  • Athletics: Your brawny eldamon gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.P04Hw8E6WAWARKHP]{Quick Climb} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.bFoh3267kNLk68cU]{Quick Swim} skill feat (choose for each brawny eldamon).
  • Intimidation: Your terrifying eldamon gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.dc8X2Mbtwq6kGp7F]{Terrified Retreat} skill feat.
  • Performance: Your enthralling eldamon gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.4UXyMtXLaOxuH6Js]{Distracting Performance} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.lFwfUvH2708rl6i3]{Virtuosic Performer} skill feats.
  • Stealh: Your sneaky eldamon gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Imvu2RV2ggjJ2HZt]{Swift Sneak} skill feat.
  • Survival: Your self-sufficient eldamon gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Yj4mpROEjdCjQzMd]{Planar Survival} skill feat.
  • Thievery: Your burglarious eldamon gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.IZbjUaZI5zHTd1Vp]{Legendary Thief} skill feat.

Note: Place the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.OWVCH0M6XbQnK7mB]{Legendary Skill (Eldamon)} feature on each of your eldamon with the selected skill.

Advanced Embodiment.name: 进阶化身 Advanced Embodiment
Advanced Embodiment.description:
你获得一个元素化身专长。为了满足其先决条件，你的元素化身等级等于你的角色等级的一半。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。每次你选择它时，你都会获得另一个元素化身专长。

You gain one elemental avatar feat. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your elemental avatar level is equal to half your character level.

Special You can select this feat more than once. Each time you select it, you gain another elemental avatar feat.

Distracting Element.name: 分心元素 Distracting Element
Distracting Element.description:
你改变一种元素力量以分散那些原本免疫的敌人注意力。如果你接下来使用的动作是引导一种元素力量，你可以将力量的涌动以某种方式瞄准，从而分散任何免疫该力量主要效果的敌人注意力。如果你以你的攻击掷骰命中，或他们的豁免失败，你选择使免疫的生物直到你下个回合结束前获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}，或直到你下个回合结束前获得措手不及（状态）。若你的攻击掷骰大成功或他们的豁免大失败，则目眩或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 状态持续 1 分钟

You alter an elemental power in order to distract foes who are otherwise immune. If the next action you use is to channel an elemental power, you can aim the surges of power in a way to distract any foes who are immune to the power's main effects. If you hit with your attack roll or they fail their saving throw, you choose whether to make immune creatures @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the end of your next turn or offguard until the end of your next turn. On a critical hit with your attack roll or a critical failure on their saving throw, the dazzled or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} condition lasts for 1 minute

Toughness Training.name: 坚韧训练 Toughness Training
Toughness Training.description:
当相位化时，eldamon 在我们的现实中可能是短暂的，你训练你的 eldamon 伙伴变得格外坚韧，甚至比其他 eldamon 战斗者更强韧。你所有受训的 eldamon 的最大生命值增加其等级。这与 eldamon 战斗者感召的增益是累积的。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.5eyM5Jemvq13WqYW]{效果：坚韧训练}

While phased in eldamon can be ephemeral in our reality, you train your eldamon friends to be especially tough, even compared to other eldamon battlers. All your trained eldamon increase their maximum Hit Points by their level. This is cumulative with the benefits of the eldamon battler calling.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.5eyM5Jemvq13WqYW]{Effect: Toughness Training}

Widen Element.name: 拓宽元素 Widen Element
Widen Element.description:
你操控自身力量的能量，使其扩散并影响更大的区域。若你接下来使用的下一个动作是引导一个具有爆发、锥形或直线区域且不具有持续时间的元素力量，则增加该力量的区域。将通常半径至少为10英尺的爆发半径增加5英尺（半径更小的爆发不受影响）。将通常长度为15英尺或更短的锥形或直线长度增加5英尺，并将更大的锥形或直线长度增加10英尺。

You manipulate the energy of your power, causing it to spread out and affect a wider area. If the next action you use is to channel an elemental power that has an area of a burst, cone, or line and does not have a duration, increase the area of that power. Add 5 feet to the radius of a burst that normally has a radius of at least 10 feet (a burst with a smaller radius is not affected). Add 5 feet to the length of a cone or line that is normally 15 feet long or smaller, and add 10 feet to the length of a larger cone or line.

Sudden Switch.name: 突然换位 Sudden Switch
Sudden Switch.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 你的回合开始

需求 你处于相位移出状态，你的一只受训的eldamon处于相位移入状态，并且你能够进行Phase Eldamon

尽管这样做会相当扰乱它们的元素力量，你仍会在两只eldamon之间快速切换以适应局势。你进行Phase Eldamon，在你当前相位移入的eldamon与另一只你已准备的eldamon之间切换。然而，由于快速的相位转移，新相位移入的eldamon会消耗其所有反应力量，以及数量等同于你先前相位移入的eldamon在未刷新前已使用的主动力量数量的主动力量。例如，若你的squirrelava已使用其三个主动火力量中的两个，而你使用Sudden Switch换成glaciotter，你必须从glaciotter的三个主动力量中选择两个并将其消耗但不产生任何效果，这意味着glaciotter在刷新前只能使用剩余的那个主动力量。即使你处于相位移出状态，你也可以使用此自由动作（），尽管通常你在相位移出时无法行动。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger Your turn begins

Requirements You are phased out, one of your trained eldamon is phased in, and you are able to Phase Eldamon

Though it's quite disruptive to their elemental powers to do so, you rapidly switch between two eldamon to adapt to the situation. You Phase Eldamon to switch between your currently phased in eldamon and another of your prepared eldamon. However, due to the rapid phase shift, the newly phased in eldamon expends all their reactive powers and a number of active powers equal to the number of active powers your previously phased in eldamon had used without refreshing. For example, if your squirrelava had used two of their three active fire powers and you used Sudden Switch to swap to glaciotter, you must choose two of glaciotter's three active powers and expend them with no effect, meaning glaciotter can only use the remaining active power before refreshing. You can use this free action even when you're phased out, even though you normally can't act when phased out.

Elemental Resistance.name: 元素抗力 Elemental Resistance
Elemental Resistance.description:
你与自身元素的联结赋予你独特的抗力与防御能力，因为你的身体、心智与灵魂会重新构成，以更好地承受你的元素。你获得你的元素所列出的元素抗力效果。

Your connection to your element grants you distinctive resistances and defensive abilities, as your body, mind, and soul reconfigure to withstand your element better. You gain the elemental resistance effect listed for your element.

Delayed Element.name: 延迟元素 Delayed Element
Delayed Element.description:
你将一项元素力量延后到之后。选择一个轮数，最多 1 分钟。如果你接下来使用的下一个动作是引导一项元素力量，则该力量不会立刻发生，而是在所选轮数后或当你刷新时（以先到者为准）生效。你在引导该力量时选择其区域并做出其他决定，而不是在其生效时。视情况而定，这可能导致该力量没有任何效果（例如目标超出射程，或你将其延后直到你刷新而该力量在你刷新时结束）。

You delay an elemental power for later. Choose a number of rounds, up to 1 minute. If the next action you use is to channel an elemental power, instead of happening instantly, the power takes effect after the chosen number of rounds or when you refresh, whichever comes first. You choose the power's area and make other decisions when you channel the power, not when it comes into effect. Depending on the situation, that could cause the power to have no effect (such as if the target is out of range, or if you delay until you Refresh and the power ends when you Refresh).

Elemental Steps.name: 元素步法 Elemental Steps
Elemental Steps.description:
你训练并激励你的艾达蒙朋友更迅捷、更灵巧地移动，使他们更容易就位。你所有受训的艾达蒙的速度提高5尺。此外，他们可以步入困难地形。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.DOySXD5ixhweBh0J]{效果：元素步伐}

You train and motivate your eldamon friends to move more swiftly and deftly, making it easier for them to get into position. All your trained eldamon increase their Speeds by 5 feet. Additionally, they can Step into difficult terrain.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.DOySXD5ixhweBh0J]{Effect: Elemental Steps}

Basic Friendship.name: 基础友谊 Basic Friendship
Basic Friendship.description:
你获得一个你选择的1级或2级艾尔达蒙训练师专长。

You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level eldamon trainer feat of your choice.

Eldamon Coordinator.name: 艾达蒙协调员 Eldamon Coordinator
Eldamon Coordinator.description:
你安排你的艾达兽朋友随行队伍，以有趣、时尚、可爱或其他视觉上引人注目的方式展示他们。你选择此专长时，为你的艾达兽选择一个视觉主题，不过你之后可以根据你改变艾达兽随行队伍的方式来更改它。当你 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} 时，你可以选择将你的交涉检定结果与额外数量的目标的意志 DC 相比较，其数量等于你已准备的艾达兽数量（通常在 1 级时额外 3 个目标，总计 4 个）。当你这么做时，你已准备的艾达兽会在你说话时梳妆打扮、顾盼自雄、摆姿势，并以其他方式影响其他目标，使你在该交涉检定上获得 +1 环境加值。你可以使用表演来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EEDElIyin4z60PXx]{Perform} 或通过展示你的艾达兽来布置一场表演。当你这么做时，你的艾达兽就如同最精良的乐器一样好用。如果你拥有进阶训练职业特性，当以这种方式使用你的艾达兽时，你在表演检定上获得 +1 物品加值；如果你拥有艾达兽进化职业特性，该加值提升至 +2；如果你拥有艾达兽怪物职业特性，该加值提升至 +3。你与自己的艾达兽共享该物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.YEWGswyBumRaCkhw]{效果：艾达兽协调者}

You arrange your entourage of eldamon friends to present them in a way that is interesting, fashionable, cute, or otherwise visually striking. When you select this feat, choose a visual theme for your eldamon, though you can change it later depending on the way you change your eldamon entourage. When you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression}, you can choose to compare your Diplomacy check result to the Will DCs of an additional number of targets equal to your number of prepared eldamon (typically three more targets for a total of four at 1st level). When you do so, your prepared eldamon primp, preen, pose, and otherwise influence the other targets while you speak, granting you a +1 circumstance bonus on the Diplomacy check. You can use Performance to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EEDElIyin4z60PXx]{Perform} or stage a performance by showing off your eldamon. When you do, your eldamon serve just as well as the finest musical instruments. If you have the advanced training class feature, you gain a +1 item bonus on your Performance checks when using your eldamon in this way, and the bonus increases to +2 if you have the eldamon evolution class feature and +3 if you have the eldamon monster class feature. You share this item bonus with your eldamon.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.YEWGswyBumRaCkhw]{Effect: Eldamon Coordinator}

Infinite Flexibility.name: 无限适应性 Infinite Flexibility
Infinite Flexibility.description:
你总是能将所有力量掌握在指尖，它们就在你清醒的心智所触及的范围之外，随时准备将其潜能化为现实，无需任何准备。在一次遭遇中你第一个回合开始时，以及每次你刷新时，你都可以像你在每日准备期间的正常选择那样，准备一组新的元素力量。

You always have all of your powers at your fingertips, just outside the reach of your conscious mind, ready to actualize their potential without any need for preparation. At the beginning of your first turn in an encounter, and each time you refresh, you can prepare a new set of elemental powers, just like your normal selection during your daily preparations.

Elemental Conformation.name: 元素构体 Elemental Conformation
Elemental Conformation.description:
你将你的艾尔达魔的能量接纳进你身体的根本构成之中，使你的外貌与内部结构以与你的元素相关的方式发生改变，例如获得燃烧或冰冻的血液。每当你受到一次重击时，尝试一次 @Check[type:flat|dc:16]。在一次成功时，它变为一次普通命中。此外，你获得等同于你等级的精准伤害抗力；如常规所述，若该抗力高于额外精准伤害的数值，它会将额外伤害降低至0，但不会减少该次攻击的普通伤害。

You accept your eldamon's energy into your body's fundamental makeup, causing your appearance and internal structure to change in ways related to your element, such as gaining burning or freezing blood. Each time you're critically hit, attempt a @Check[type:flat|dc:16]. On a success, it becomes a normal hit. Additionally, you gain resistance to precision damage equal to your level; as normal, if the resistance is higher than the amount of additional precision damage, it reduces the additional damage to 0 but doesn't reduce the attack's normal damage.

Familiar.name: 魔宠 Familiar
Familiar.description:
Eldamon训练师 除了你受训的eldamon之外，你还设法与一只次级eldamon建立连接，并将其永久带入相位。你获得一只魔宠，其外观通常会与某一特定类型eldamon的宠物形态有些相似。即使在相位外你通常无法行动，你也可以在相位外时命令该魔宠。此外，若你的魔宠位于你的视觉线内且在160英尺内，当你以完全相同种类的eldamon使用Incarnate Eldamon时，你可以将魔宠所在位置作为抵达点，而非你自身的位置。

元素化身 你可以将你体内eldamon的较弱化身显现为一只在你旅行中协助你的魔宠。你获得一只魔宠，其外观通常类似于你体内的eldamon。

Eldamon Trainer In addition to your trained eldamon, you have managed to connect with a minor eldamon and bring it into phase permanently. You gain a familiar, which typically bears some resemblance to the pet form of a specific type of eldamon. You can Command the familiar when phased out, even though you normally can't act while phased out. Additionally, if your familiar is within your line of sight and within 160 feet, you can use your familiar's position as the arrival point when you Incarnate Eldamon with an eldamon of the exact same kind, rather than your own position.

Elemental Avatar You can manifest a lesser incarnation of the eldamon within you into a familiar that assists you in your travels. You gain a familiar, which typically resembles the eldamon within you.

Fluctuating Phase.name: 波动相位 Fluctuating Phase
Fluctuating Phase.description:
需求 你有一个已相位进入的受训 eldamon。

你与自己的 eldamon 一同训练，将你的相位共享用于对他们有利的方式，使他们能够部分移出以避免成为各种效果的目标。当你的 eldamon 使用 Fluctuating Phase 时，直到你下个回合开始前，任何试图以攻击、法术或其他效果作为目标指向你的 eldamon 的生物都必须在一次 @Check[type:flat|dc:5] 中成功。若失败，该效果将被浪费，因为你的 eldamon 会短暂地相位移出。

特殊 当你获得此专长时，你的受训 eldamon 获得使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.actions.Item.uiKK5nKLem05YB07]{Fluctuating Phase} 动作的能力，而不是你获得使用该动作的能力。

Requirements You have a trained eldamon phased in.

You train with your eldamon to use your phase sharing to their advantage, allowing them to partially shift out to avoid being targeted by various effects. When your eldamon uses Fluctuating Phase, until the beginning of your next turn, any creature that attempts to target your eldamon with an attack, spell, or other effect must succeed at a @Check[type:flat|dc:5]. On a failure, the effect is wasted as your eldamon phases out briefly.

Special When you take this feat, your trained eldamon gain the ability to use the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.actions.Item.uiKK5nKLem05YB07]{Fluctuating Phase} action instead of you gaining the ability to use the action.

Interstitial Phase.name: 间隙相位 Interstitial Phase
Interstitial Phase.description:
需求你有一只受训的eldamon已相位入场。

你已训练你的eldamon在两只eldamon之间快速切换相位，并在你处于相位中的短暂时间里让你自己也能执行一个快速动作。你当前相位入场的eldamon使用Phase Eldamon切换到另一只eldamon。就在第一只eldamon相位退场之后、下一只相位入场之前，你（eldamon训练师）执行你选择的一个单动作。

特殊当你获得此专长时，你的受训eldamon获得能力：由它们而非你来使用@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.actions.Item.D5bfwD32zzH05DfH]{Interstitial Phase}行动。

Requirements You have a trained eldamon phased in.

You've trained your eldamon to rapidly swap phase between two eldamon while taking a quick action of your own for the brief time you are in phase. Your currently phased in eldamon uses Phase Eldamon to switch to another eldamon. Just after the first eldamon phases out and just before the next one phases in, you (the eldamon trainer) take a single action of your choice.

Special When you take this feat, your trained eldamon gain the ability to use the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.actions.Item.D5bfwD32zzH05DfH]{Interstitial Phase} activity instead of you.

Elemental Apotheosis.name: 元素神化 Elemental Apotheosis
Elemental Apotheosis.description:
频率 每日一次

你汲取体内艾达兽的全部元素潜能，将自身重新锻造成强大的复合体存在，其力量远胜于各部分之和。当你处于元素神化的激荡之中时，元素能量在你周身盘旋，你的双眼闪耀着与你的元素相关的颜色，而变化带来的其他视觉特性也让你那满溢的元素能量对周围所有人一目了然。此神化持续1分钟，在此期间，你的攻击掷骰、技能检定与豁免获得+4状态加值，并获得40临时生命值。当神化结束时，你的身体必须从以元素能量过载自身的冲击中恢复。你成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}，并且你的力量攻击掷骰与力量DC承受–2减值；这两个效果都会在你休息10分钟、让身体有时间恢复后结束。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.kw4f5rU0SeLLOasj]{效果：元素神化}

Frequency once per day

You draw upon the full elemental potential of the eldamon within you, reforging yourself into a powerful composite being far greater than the sum of your parts. While within the throes of your elemental apotheosis, elemental energies swirl around you, your eyes glow with a color associated with your element, and other visual features of the transformation make your overflowing elemental energy abundantly clear to everyone around you. This apotheosis lasts for 1 minute, during which time you gain a +4 status bonus to attack rolls, skill checks, and saving throws, as well as 40 temporary Hit Points. When the apotheosis ends, your body must recover from the shock of overloading yourself with elemental energy. You become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} and you take a –2 penalty to your power attack rolls and power DCs; both effects end after you rest for 10 minutes to give your body time to recover.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.kw4f5rU0SeLLOasj]{Effect: Elemental Apotheosis}

Echoing Element.name: 回响元素 Echoing Element
Echoing Element.description:
频率 每小时一次

通过运用你事先储存在体内、心智、生命力或灵体中的元素能量模式，你能够以与当地元素能量完美一致的方式显现一种元素力量。这使你无需先刷新你的元素力量，便可再次使用同一种力量。若你接下来使用的下一个动作是引导一种元素力量，你可以在不刷新（刷新）的情况下再次使用该力量。回响元素仍不会让你比通常的每小时一次限制更频繁地使用终极力量，因此通常你并不适合将回响元素与终极力量一同使用。

Frequency once per hour

By using patterns of elemental energy you stored up within your body, mind, life force, or spirit in advance, you're able to manifest an elemental power in perfect alignment with the local elemental energies. This allows you to use that same power again without needing to refresh your elemental powers first. If the next action you use is to channel an elemental power, you can use that power again without Refreshing. Echoing Element still doesn't allow you to use ultimate powers more often than the usual limit of once per hour, so it typically isn't useful for you to use Echoing Element with your ultimate power.

Evolved Colossus.name: 进化巨像 Evolved Colossus
Evolved Colossus.description:
你已帮助你进化的艾尔达兽学会如何达到真正荒诞的体型。当你或你的艾尔达兽使用相位艾尔达兽，以其进化战斗形态相位出一只艾尔达兽时，你可以选择将其相位为巨型的进化战斗形态，而不是其进化战斗形态的通常体型。当你如此做时，你的艾尔达兽的触及为20英尺（除非其触及通常更大）。如果该进化战斗形态通常为超大体型，则你的艾尔达兽在巨型战斗形态下的触及改为25英尺（除非其触及通常更大）。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.w8168U174SSVPcnq]{效果: Evolved Colossus}

You've helped your evolved eldamon learn how to reach truly preposterous sizes. When you or your eldamon use Phase Eldamon to phase in an eldamon in their evolved battle form, you can choose to phase them into a Gargantuan evolved battle form instead of their evolved battle form's normal size. When you do, your eldamon has a reach of 20 feet (unless its reach is normally greater). If the evolved battle form was normally Huge, your eldamon has a reach of 25 feet in the Gargantuan battle form instead (unless its reach is normally greater).

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.w8168U174SSVPcnq]{Effect: Evolved Colossus}

Additional Elemental Powers.name: 额外元素力量 Additional Elemental Powers
Additional Elemental Powers.description:
你比其他元素化身知晓更多元素力量，使你每天能更容易地调整自身能力以适应局势。你学会两个额外的元素力量，由你选择，其等级为你的等级或更低。照常规，它们必须是你所属元素的力量或通用力量；你不能用此专长学会终极力量；并且即使你通过重训获得此专长，你学会的力量仍受你所使用的该专长的等级限制，而不是重训后你当前的等级限制。此专长不会让你能同时准备更多元素力量，它只是让你在每天准备时有更多可选项。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。每次你这样做时，你会学会两个额外的元素力量，其等级为你的等级或更低。

You know more elemental powers than other elemental avatars, allowing you to adjust your abilities more easily each day to match the situation. You learn two additional elemental powers of your choice of your level or lower. As normal, they must be powers of your element or universal powers, you can't use this feat to learn an ultimate power, and even if you retrain into this feat, the powers you learn are limited by the level of the feat you used, not your current level after retraining. This doesn't give you the ability to prepare more elemental powers at the same time, it simply provides you more options to choose from when preparing each day.

Special You can take this feat multiple times. Each time you do, you learn two additional elemental powers of your level or lower.

Compact Phase.name: 紧凑相位 Compact Phase
Compact Phase.description:
你和你的艾尔达魔伙伴明白，形态是短暂的，这让你能以比正常更小的体型让艾尔达魔相位进入，可能使它们更容易适应更小的空间。当你或你的艾尔达魔使用相位艾尔达魔时，你的艾尔达魔可以选择任何不超过该艾尔达魔战斗形态（或如适用则为进化形态）正常体型的体型。

You and your eldamon friends understand that forms are transient, allowing you to phase in eldamon at smaller sizes than normal, potentially allowing them to fit more easily into smaller spaces. When you or your eldamon uses Phase Eldamon, your eldamon can take any size up to the normal size for the eldamon's battle form (or evolved form, if appropriate).

Advanced Friendship.name: 进阶友谊 Advanced Friendship
Advanced Friendship.description:
你获得1个艾达兽训练师专长。为了满足其先决条件，你的艾达兽训练师等级等同于你角色等级的一半。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。每次你选择它时，你获得另一个艾达兽训练师专长。

You gain one eldamon trainer feat. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your eldamon trainer level is equal to half your character level.

Special You can select this feat more than once. Each time you select it, you gain another eldamon trainer feat.

Divert Usurper.name: 转移篡位者 Divert Usurper
Divert Usurper.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

触发 你对抗一个死亡效果、心智效果或灵体效果的豁免失败。

你与体内的eldamon建立了如此牢固的关系，使其愿意转移那些意在篡夺你生命力、心智或灵体的效果。由于你体内的eldamon将部分效果转移到自身，你可以对触发的豁免进行重骰，取两次结果中较好的那个。随后eldamon进入静息状态，在接下来的10分钟内代谢这些效果。若你在第二次豁免中仍然失败（或大失败），你可以选择将更多效果压到eldamon身上，并将你的成功等级提高到比你两次掷骰中较好结果的成功等级再好一级；但若你这么做，你在10分钟内不能使用元素力量。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Trigger You fail a saving throw against a death effect, mental effect, or spirit effect.

You've built up such a strong relationship with the eldamon inside you that it's willing to divert effects aimed to usurp your life force, mind, or spirit. Reroll the triggering saving throw as the eldamon within you takes on some of the effects into itself, taking the better of the two results. The eldamon then becomes quiescent, metabolizing the effects over the next 10 minutes. If you still fail (or critically fail) the second saving throw, you can choose to push even more of the effect onto the eldamon and improve your degree of success to one better than the better of the two results you rolled, but if you do, you can't use elemental powers for 10 minutes.

Elemental Display.name: 元素展示 Elemental Display
Elemental Display.description:
你可以通过唤起令人印象深刻的元素展现来恐吓生物。你这样做时，可以在不具备听觉（特征）的情况下使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{挫敌气势}。在这种情况下，你的挫敌气势尝试获得视觉（特征），且如果该生物不理解你的语言，你不会承受减值。如果你在使用一项主动的元素力量后以这种方式挫敌气势，你进行挫敌气势的检定获得+1环境加值；若你在威吓中为大师，则改为+2环境加值。

You can intimidate creatures by calling forth impressive displays of your element. When you do, you can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} without the auditory trait. In this case, your Demoralize attempt gains the visual trait, and you don't take a penalty if the creature doesn't understand your language. If you Demoralize in this way after using an active elemental power, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to the check to Demoralize, or a +2 circumstance bonus if you're a master in Intimidation.

Empowered Spells.name: 强化法术 Empowered Spells
Empowered Spells.description:
在你体内翻涌的压倒性元素能量会强化你从自身族裔或其他来源获得、且与自身元素相匹配的法术；匹配与否可以基于其特性，或由你的GM决定。当你施放与自身元素相匹配的法术时，你可以使用你的力量DC或你的法术DC来决定该法术的DC，以较高者为准。若该法术需要进行法术攻击掷骰，你可以使用你的力量DC – 10或你的法术攻击调整来决定该法术的法术攻击调整，以较高者为准。你不能将你的力量攻击调整用于法术，且这些好处不适用于与自身元素不匹配的法术。

The overwhelming elemental energies swirling through you empower spells you gain from your ancestry or other sources that match your element, either based on their trait or as determined by your GM. When you Cast a Spell that matches your element, you can use your power DC or your spell DC to determine the spell's DC, whichever is higher. If the spell has a spell attack roll, you can use your power DC – 10 or your spell attack modifier to determine the spell attack modifier, whichever is higher. You can't use your power attack modifier for spells, and these benefits don't apply to spells that don't match your element.

Throw Phase.name: 投掷相位 Throw Phase
Throw Phase.description:
当你与艾尔达兽朋友共享你的相位时，你可以在更远的距离内这么做。你可以使用 Phase Eldamon 将一只距离你最多 30 尺的艾尔达兽相位化进入，而不再仅限于相邻位置。这使你在将艾尔达兽相位化出入时，能够策略性地安置它们的位置。只要你选择以你的位置作为新出现的艾尔达兽的起点，而不是以艾尔达兽的位置作为起点，那么无论是你还是你的艾尔达兽使用 Phase Eldamon，此增益都适用。

When you share your phase with your eldamon friends, you can do so from an increased distance. You can Phase Eldamon to phase in an eldamon up to 30 feet away from you, rather than only in an adjacent position. This allows you to position your eldamon strategically as you phase them in and out. This benefit applies whether you or your eldamon uses Phase Eldamon, as long as you choose your location as the origin point for the new eldamon, rather than the eldamon's location.

Eldamon Flexibility.name: 艾达蒙灵活性 Eldamon Flexibility
Eldamon Flexibility.description:
你与自己的艾达蒙的调谐十分灵活，使你能够相对轻松地改变哪些艾达蒙已准备好进行相位现身。你花费10分钟与一只你尚未准备进行相位现身的艾达蒙互动并与其调谐后，你便将该艾达蒙准备为可进行相位现身，并取代你当天先前已准备进行相位现身的一只艾达蒙。

Your attunement to your eldamon is flexible, allowing you to shift which eldamon are prepared to phase in with relative ease. By spending 10 minutes interacting with and attuning to one of your eldamon you didn't prepare to phase in, you prepare to phase in that eldamon, replacing one of the eldamon you previously prepared to phase in that day.

Metapower Mastery.name: 超能力精通 Metapower Mastery
Metapower Mastery.description:
你能轻松微调并调整你的元素力量，只需一个念头便可施加特殊效果。当你使用通常需要单动作的元力量动作时，你可以改为以自由动作（）使用它。

You can tweak and adjust your elemental powers with ease, applying special effects with but a mere thought. When you use a metapower action that normally takes a single action, you can use it as a free action instead.

Panelemental Protection.name: 泛元素防护 Panelemental Protection
Panelemental Protection.description:
你让自己被元素能量环绕，以保护你免受几乎所有类型的元素与能量攻击。你获得酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火、力场、精神、毒素、音波、活力与虚无伤害的抗力10。

You surround yourself in elemental energies that protect you from elemental and energy attacks of nearly all sorts. You gain resistance 10 to acid, cold, electricity, fire, force, mental, poison, sonic, vitality, and void damage.

Elemental Locomotion.name: 元素移动方式 Elemental Locomotion
Elemental Locomotion.description:
你一生中日复一日地练习运用你的元素，并且你已经开发出通过你的元素能量来移动自己的新方式。你获得你元素中列出的元素移动能力。

You've practiced using your element day in and day out throughout your life, and you've developed new ways to move yourself around via your element's energies. You gain the elemental locomotion ability listed in your element.

Hang in There Eldamon!.name: 坚持住，埃尔达蒙！ Hang in There Eldamon!
Hang in There Eldamon!.description:
触发 你相位进入的eldamon受到会将其降至0生命值的伤害

需求 你处于相位退出状态，且你一只受训的eldamon处于相位进入状态。你的生命值高于处于相位进入状态的eldamon的最大生命值。

你对你的eldamon关怀得太深，不愿让他们倒下。你失去等同于触发伤害，或你的当前生命值与eldamon最大生命值之间差值的生命值，取两者中较低者。你的eldamon将触发伤害减少相同数值。若该减免足以防止你的eldamon被降至0生命值，他们保持相位进入状态。你的相位进入的eldamon仍会承受与触发伤害相关的任何其他效果，例如击中他们的武器上的伤口毒素，即使你将伤害转移到了自己身上。即使你处于相位退出状态，你也可以使用此反应动作（），尽管通常在相位退出状态下你无法行动。

Trigger Your phased in eldamon takes damage that would reduce it to 0 Hit Points

Requirements You are phased out, and one of your trained eldamon is phased in. You have more Hit Points than the maximum Hit Points of the eldamon that's phased in.

You care too deeply for your eldamon to allow them to fall. You lose a number of Hit Points equal to the triggering damage or the difference between your current Hit Points and your eldamon's maximum Hit Points, whichever is lower. Your eldamon reduces the triggering damage by the same amount. If this reduction is enough to prevent your eldamon from being reduced to 0 Hit Points, they remain phased in. Your phased in eldamon still takes any other effects associated with the triggering damage, such as an injury poison on the weapon that hit them, even though you transferred the damage to yourself. You can use this reaction even when you're phased out, even though you normally can't act when phased out.

Overwhelming Element.name: 压倒性元素 Overwhelming Element
Overwhelming Element.description:
你体内涌动着压倒性的元素力量，使你能够克服生物的抗力。若你接下来使用的动作是引导一项元素力量，则该力量无视目标对你元素的特征所具有的抗力，其数值等于你的等级。此外，若你的元素具有对应的伤害类型，则该力量也无视目标对该伤害类型所具有的抗力，其数值等于你的等级。这适用于该力量造成的所有伤害，包括持续伤害以及由该力量的持续效果所造成的伤害，例如“闷燃帷幕”所创造的弧光所造成的伤害。生物的免疫不受影响。

Your overwhelming elemental power flows within you, allowing you to overcome a creature's resistances. If the next action you use is to channel an elemental power, the power ignores an amount of the target's resistance to your element's trait equal to your level. Additionally, if your element has an associated damage type, the power also ignores an amount of the target's resistance to that damage type equal to your level. This applies to all damage the power deals, including persistent damage and damage caused by an ongoing effect of the power, such as the arc created by Smoldering Curtain. A creature's immunities are unaffected.

Evolved Giant.name: 进化的巨人 Evolved Giant
Evolved Giant.description:
你已经与你的eldamon一同训练，以提升其进化形态的体型。当你或你的eldamon使用相位Eldamon，将一只处于其进化战斗形态的eldamon相位入场时，你可以选择让其以巨型战斗形态入场，而非其进化战斗形态的正常体型；并且如果你的eldamon的进化战斗形态通常为巨型，你可以选择使其变为超巨型。当你选择让你的eldamon的进化战斗形态变得更大时，该eldamon的触及为15尺（除非其触及通常更大）。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.4xUJZAKz1Qd3KQe9]{效果：进化巨人}

You've trained with your eldamon in order to increase the size of their evolved forms. When you or your eldamon use Phase Eldamon to phase in an eldamon in their evolved battle form, you can choose to phase them into a Huge battle form instead of their evolved battle form's normal size, and if your eldamon's evolved battle form is normally Huge, you can choose to have it become Gargantuan instead. When you choose to make your eldamon's evolved battle form larger, the eldamon has a reach of 15 feet (unless its reach is normally greater).

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.4xUJZAKz1Qd3KQe9]{Effect: Evolved Giant}

Demoralizing Element.name: 挫敌元素 Demoralizing Element
Demoralizing Element.description:
你改变你的元素力量，使其专门用于在你的目标中播撒恐惧。若你接下来使用的动作是引导一次元素力量，你可以对每个未能通过该力量豁免的敌人，或被你的力量攻击掷骰命中的敌人，分别进行一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} 尝试。这些敌人不需要在30尺内。之后，无论你是否对他们进行 Demoralize，这些敌人都在10分钟内暂时免疫你的 Demoralizing Element。

You alter your elemental power specifically to sow terror in your targets. If the next action you use is to channel an elemental power, you can roll a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} attempt against each foe that fails their save against the power, or that you hit with your power attack roll. The foes do not need to be within 30 feet. Afterward, whether you Demoralize them or not, the foes are all temporarily immune to your Demoralizing Element for 10 minutes.

Elemental Scholar.name: 元素学者 Elemental Scholar
Elemental Scholar.description:
你对你的元素有着深刻的了解，这使你能够察觉、理解并防御你的元素的显现。你可以使用自然来识别具有你元素相关特征或特征（或由GM判定与该元素高度相关的其他生物）的生物，而非使用通常用于对这类生物进行回忆知识的技能；并且你总是可以在对抗这类生物时为先攻掷骰自然。你在针对这类生物进行回忆知识的自然检定，以及对抗这类生物的先攻掷骰上，获得+2环境加值。此外，你对你的元素的深刻知识使你在对抗这类生物的察觉检定和豁免上获得+2环境加值。

You have a deep knowledge of your element, which allows you to notice, understand, and defend against manifestations of your element. You can identify creatures with your element's associated trait or traits (or other creatures heavily associated with your element as determined by the GM) using Nature, instead of the normal skill used to Recall Knowledge about such creatures, and you can always roll Nature for initiative against such creatures. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Nature checks to Recall Knowledge about such creatures and on initiative rolls against such creatures. Furthermore, your deep knowledge about your element grants you a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks and saving throws against such creatures.

Diffusive Effusion.name: 扩散溢散 Diffusive Effusion
Diffusive Effusion.description:
当你倾泻出奔涌的元素能量时，你可以在更广阔的区域内这样做，使你能够对不止一个生物测试元素抗力。当你使用元素灌注职业特性时，你可以将其用于你在120英尺内可感知到的所有敌人，而非60英尺内的单个敌人。

When you spill out effusive elemental energy, you can do so in a much wider area, allowing you to test more than one creature for elemental resistance. When you use the elemental effusion class feature, you can use it against all foes you can perceive within 120 feet, rather than a single foe within 60 feet.

Eldamon Trainer Dedication.name: 艾达兽训练师奉献 Eldamon Trainer Dedication
Eldamon Trainer Dedication.description:
你可以暂时让你的艾达兽朋友进入相位，使他们能够施展一种元素力量，并影响与物质世界处于同一相位的其他生物；但由于你分散了专注，因此你每天可准备进入相位的艾达兽朋友数量比专注的训练师少 1 个。每天，选择数量为 2 或你的魅力调整值（取较低者）的艾达兽朋友。在当天期间，你可以让他们进入相位为你战斗。你获得“化身艾达兽”专长，这是你让艾达兽进入相位的唯一方式；你永远无法获得“相位艾达兽”或其他会让你自己退出相位或让你的艾达兽进入相位的专长或特性。由于你以这种方式让艾达兽进入相位时，你们之间的联结比一名奉献的艾达兽训练师更不稳定，他们的力量攻击掷骰与力量 DC 承受 –2 减值，并且他们可使用的力量以及这些力量的效果都受到限制。他们只能使用等级至多为你等级一半的力量；并且在决定其力量的伤害、反制等级以及其他随等级成长的增益（如临时生命值与射程）时，他们的有效等级等同于你等级的一半（或其自身等级，若其更低；但艾达兽通常会与其朋友一同升级）。例如，在第 6 等级时，你的艾达兽的最大有效等级将为 3，因此可以使用至多 3 环的力量，其力量的反制等级为 2；若其力量造成 @Damage[1d6[untyped]] 伤害外加每拥有 1 个等级再造成 @Damage[1d6[untyped]] 伤害，则其将造成 @Damage[4d6[untyped]] 伤害。与通常情况相同，当一只艾达兽以这种方式退出相位时，他们会刷新。

与其他拥有艾达兽朋友的角色一样，由于你不会获得艾达兽训练师的“进阶训练”“艾达兽进化”或“巅峰训练”职业特性，你的艾达兽的属性调整值在第 17 等级之前都保持其初始数值，并在第 17 等级时获得最终一次感知的属性提升，使感知提高至 +5。

特殊 在你从艾达兽训练师变体获得另外两个专长之前，你不能选择另一个奉献专长。

You can temporarily phase in your eldamon friends, allowing them to perform an elemental power and affect other creatures in phase with the physical world, though you're diverting your focus, so you can prepare to phase one fewer eldamon friends than a focused trainer. Each day, choose a number of your eldamon friends that is either 2 or your Charisma modifier, whichever is lower. Throughout the day, you can phase them in to fight for you. You gain the Incarnate Eldamon feat, which is the only way you can phase in an eldamon; you can never gain Phase Eldamon or other feats or features that phase yourself out or your eldamon in. Because your connection is less stable than a dedicated eldamon trainer when you phase in an eldamon in this way, they take a –2 penalty to their power attack rolls and power DCs, and they're limited in which powers they can use, and those powers' effects. They can only use powers whose level are at most half your level, and their effective level for the purpose of determining their powers' damage, counteract level, and other scaling benefits (like temporary Hit Points and range), is equal to half your level (or their level if it is lower, but eldamon usually level up alongside their friends). For instance, at 6th level, your eldamon's maximum effective level would be 3, so could use up to a 3rd level power, their powers would have a counteract level of 2, and if their power deals @Damage[1d6[untyped]] damage plus @Damage[1d6[untyped]] damage for each level they have, they would deal @Damage[4d6[untyped]] damage. As normal, when an eldamon phases out in this way, they Refresh.

Like other characters with eldamon friends, since you don't gain the eldamon trainer's advanced training, eldamon evolution, or apex training class features, your eldamon's attribute modifiers remain at their starting values until 17th level and then gain a final attribute boost to Wisdom, raising Wisdom to +5.

Special You can't select another dedication feat until you have gained two other feats from the eldamon trainer archetype.

Elemental Shield.name: 元素护盾 Elemental Shield
Elemental Shield.description:
你已经学会如何运用你的元素来保护自己。你获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.ZY4eKLzGrU2WmMGF]{元素护盾}特性，其效果取决于你的元素。

You've learned how to use your element to defend yourself. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.ZY4eKLzGrU2WmMGF]{Elemental Shield} feature with the effects based on your element.

Third Calling.name: 第三感召 Third Calling
Third Calling.description:
艾尔达兽就是你的一切，而它们存在的每个性相都在向你呼唤。关于艾尔达兽，没有任何一部分不是你痴迷的。选择第三个感召并获得该感召的所有收益，以及与该感召相关的6级专长（艾尔达兽斗士的坚韧训练、艾尔达兽研究者的研究者洞见，以及艾尔达兽低语者的我相信你！）。

Eldamon are your everything, and every aspect of their existence calls out to you. There's no part of eldamon about which you don't obsess. Choose a third calling and gain that calling's benefits, as well as the 6th level feat associated with that calling (Toughness Training for eldamon battler, Researcher's Insight for eldamon researcher, and I Believe In You! For eldamon whisperer).

Remembered Echoes.name: 铭记回响 Remembered Echoes
Remembered Echoes.description:
你的艾尔达兽尤其善于适应与学习，能记住其远古过去的回响或遥远未来的低语。这使它们能够比正常情况更快地重训其力量。重训一项艾尔达兽的力量不再需要1周，而只需要1天。

Your eldamon are especially quick to adjust and learn, remembering the echoes of their ancient past or the whispers of their distant futures. This allows them to retrain their powers much faster than normal. Instead of taking 1 week to retrain an eldamon's power, it takes only 1 day.

Eldamon Exploration.name: 艾达蒙探索 Eldamon Exploration
Eldamon Exploration.description:
你已学会如何与自己的艾达兽一同操控你的导管，使它们在探索期间保持活跃而不拖慢队伍。你可以为你的一只艾达兽选择一个探索行动让它代替你执行，而无需放慢速度以便追上你的艾达兽。

特殊 若你获得融合相位职业特性，你将不再需要“艾达兽探索”专长来让你的艾达兽自由执行探索行动，因为你可以直接与艾达兽融合，因此你可以自由重训此专长而无需花费任何休整模式来进行。

You've learned how to manipulate your conduit with your eldamon to keep them active during exploration without slowing the group down. You can choose an exploration activity for one of your eldamon to perform instead of you, without needing to slow down so that you can catch back up to your eldamon.

Special If you gain the melded phase class feature, you no longer need the Eldamon Exploration feat to have your eldamon perform exploration activities freely, since you can just meld into your eldamon, and so you can freely retrain this feat without taking any downtime to do so.

Enhanced Locomotion.name: 强化移动能力 Enhanced Locomotion
Enhanced Locomotion.description:
你已继续运用你的元素开发你的机动能力，从而获得更令人印象深刻的能力。你获得你元素中列出的强化机动能力。

特殊 空气的力量与机动性密切相关，使空气元素化身比其他元素的使用者更容易飞行。若你的元素为空气，则此专长的等级先决条件为第10等级，而非第12等级。

You've continued to develop your locomotive abilities using your element, granting you even more impressive abilities. You gain the enhanced locomotion ability listed in your element.

Special The power of air is heavily associated with mobility, making it easier for an air elemental avatar to fly than it is for users of other elements. If your element is air, this feat has a level prerequisite of 10th level, instead of 12th.

Eldamon Intimidation.name: 埃尔达蒙 威吓 Eldamon Intimidation
Eldamon Intimidation.description:
你已臻于完善地运用你那些相位移出的艾达蒙朋友来扰乱你的敌人。当你进行【胁迫】或【挫志】时，你可以选择将你的威吓检定结果与等同于你已准备的艾达蒙数量的额外目标的意志DC进行比较（如果你的关键属性的属性调整值为+4或更高，通常在10级时这会是额外四个目标，总计五个）。若你以此方式使用艾达蒙来【挫志】，则【挫志】失去听觉（特征）并获得视觉（特征），且若该生物不理解你的语言，你不承受减值。在你使用此专长尝试对一个生物进行【挫志】后，该生物会对你的艾达蒙威吓在1分钟内暂时免疫。

You’ve perfected the use of your phased out eldamon friends to unnerve your foes. When you Coerce or Demoralize, you can choose to compare your Intimidation check result to the Will DCs of an additional number of targets equal to your number of prepared eldamon (if your key attribute modifier is +4 or higher, this is typically four more targets for a total of five at 10th level). If you use your eldamon to Demoralize in this way, Demoralize loses the auditory trait and gains the visual trait, and you don’t take a penalty if the creature doesn’t understand your language. After using this feat to attempt to Demoralize a creature, the creature becomes temporarily immune to your eldamon intimidation for 1 minute.

Phase Amalgam Eldamon.name: 相位融合体艾尔达蒙 Phase Amalgam Eldamon
Phase Amalgam Eldamon.description:
你发现了一种秘密技巧，一些艾尔达兽训练师认为它是被禁止的：在将它们相位化召入时，把两只同一元素的艾尔达兽纠缠在一起，而你可以在走投无路时使用它。每日一次，当你或你的艾尔达兽使用相位化艾尔达兽时，你可以将两只你已准备的艾尔达兽相位化纠缠在一起，形成一个融合体。若你如此做，融合体艾尔达兽拥有两只艾尔达兽的元素能力、形态能力、进化能力、打击、艾尔达兽技能、艾尔达兽豁免、感官、抗力与弱点；拥有两者之中较高的速度、生命值与属性（每项属性分别决定）；并由你从其中一只艾尔达兽的力量组中选择一组。1分钟后，若融合体仍处于相位化召入状态，它会变得不稳定并自动相位化离场。若融合体因任何原因相位化离场，你都无法再次将该融合体相位化召入。若融合体被降至0生命值，两只艾尔达兽都必须等待通常的时间才能再次相位化召入（1分钟；若因死亡效果而被降至0生命值，则为1小时）。

You've discovered a secret technique, considered forbidden by some eldamon trainers, to fuse two eldamon of the same element together when phasing them in, and you can use it when you're in dire straits. Once per day, when you or your eldamon use Phase Eldamon, you can phase two of your prepared eldamon together into an amalgam. If you do, the amalgam eldamon has both eldamons' elemental abilities, form abilities, evolution abilities, Strikes, eldamon skills, eldamon saving throws, senses, resistances, and weaknesses, the higher of the two eldamons' Speeds, Hit Points, and attributes (determined for each attribute separately), and your choice of one of the eldamons' power sets. After 1 minute, if the amalgam is still phased in, it becomes unstable and automatically phases out. If the amalgam phases out for any reason, you can't phase the amalgam back in. If the amalgam is reduced to 0 Hit Points, both eldamon must wait the usual time to phase in again (1 minute, or 1 hour if reduced to 0 Hit Points by a death effect).

Untether.name: 解开束缚 Untether
Untether.description:
虽然这样做会令你感到吃力，但当你将你的相位借给它时，你可以短暂地将你的灵契魔从你身上解系。每 10 分钟一次，当你或你的灵契魔使用相位灵契魔时，你可以选择将你的灵契魔解系。若你如此做，则在 1 分钟内，你的灵契魔可以移动到离你任意距离并处于你的效果线之外，从而移除其通常必须保持在 160 英尺内且处于你的效果线内的限制。1 分钟结束后，若你的灵契魔处于效果线之外或距离你超过 160 英尺，它会立刻相位离开，而你会相位返回。

While it strains you to do so, you can briefly untether your eldamon from you when you lend it your phase. Once per 10 minutes when you or your eldamon uses Phase Eldamon, you can choose to untether your eldamon. If you do, for 1 minute, your eldamon can move any distance from you and outside your line of effect, removing the normal limitation to remain within 160 feet and within your line of effect. After 1 minute elapses, if your eldamon is outside of line of effect or more than 160 feet away from you, they instantly phase out and you phase back in.

Focused Training.name: 专注训练 Focused Training
Focused Training.description:
你训练你的艾达兽伙伴，以拓宽它们在各种技能上的能力。对你的每一只艾达兽伙伴，为其选择成为健壮、窃盗、迷人、灵巧、自给自足、鬼祟或骇人之一。如果你的艾达兽已经拥有你所选专注训练所对应的技能，则你的艾达兽改为从另一种专注训练所对应的技能中获得一项作为艾达兽技能。与它们的其他艾达兽技能一样，你的艾达兽在从专注训练获得的技能上成为受训，并且该技能在5级提升为专家，随后在11级提升为大师。

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.xiYyz5LgGBTHl9NO]{Brawny}：你的艾达兽与同类相比格外健壮。它们获得 运动 作为一项艾达兽技能，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.KxaYlC50zzHysJj8]{Titan Wrestler} 技能专长。
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.7I1yBxu8cOmJ8BpV]{Burglarious}：你的艾达兽对从他人身上顺走东西情有独钟。它们获得 盗窃 作为一项艾达兽技能，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jDdOqFmZLwE4dblQ]{Pickpocket} 技能专长。
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.DmF2FP3ony0jDEQ4]{Enthralling}：你的艾达兽能轻易迷住其他生物。它们获得 表演 作为一项艾达兽技能，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.7LB00jkh6JaJr3vS]{Fascinating Performance} 技能专长。
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.nCad5Aop03se2qsD]{Nimble}：你的艾达兽尤其灵巧，总能稳稳落地。它们获得 体操 作为一项艾达兽技能，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.LQw0yIMDUJJkq1nD]{Cat Fall} 技能专长。
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.kS8OaKPn7I387pKt]{Self-Sufficient}：你的艾达兽能照顾好自己，也能轻松追踪生物。它们获得 生存 作为一项艾达兽技能，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.urQZwmzg2kS53vd5]{Experienced Tracker} 技能专长。
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.Pjp8l2vOwb6IUPlR]{Sneaky}：你的艾达兽总在你最意想不到的地方鬼鬼祟祟地出没。它们获得 隐匿 作为一项艾达兽技能，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.beyw5bdA5hkQbmaG]{Terrain Stalker} 技能专长。
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.H0eppEwKafPfJQ4x]{Terrifying}：你的艾达兽在战斗形态下骇人至极，令人难以揣测。它们获得 威吓 作为一项艾达兽技能，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ar2DUlvDK4LDcH9J]{Quick Coercion} 技能专长。与其他将威吓作为艾达兽技能的艾达兽一样，它们也会自动获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xQMz6eDgX75WX2ce]{Intimidating Glare} 技能专长。

You train your eldamon friends to broaden their capacity for various skills. For each of your eldamon friends, choose for them to become brawny, burglarious, enthralling, nimble, self-sufficient, sneaky, or terrifying. If your eldamon already has the skill associated with the focused training you chose, your eldamon gains one of the skills associated with another focused training as an eldamon skill instead. Like their other eldamon skills, your eldamon become trained in the skill gained from focused training, and the skill increases to expert at 5th level and then to master at 11th level.

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.xiYyz5LgGBTHl9NO]{Brawny}: Your eldamon is particularly brawny compared to others of their type. They gain Athletics as an eldamon skill and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.KxaYlC50zzHysJj8]{Titan Wrestler} skill feat.
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.7I1yBxu8cOmJ8BpV]{Burglarious}: Your eldamon has a penchant for snatching things from others. They gain Thievery as an eldamon skill and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jDdOqFmZLwE4dblQ]{Pickpocket} skill feat.
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.DmF2FP3ony0jDEQ4]{Enthralling}:Your eldamon easily enthralls other creatures. They gain Performance as an eldamon skill and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.7LB00jkh6JaJr3vS]{Fascinating Performance} skill feat.
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.nCad5Aop03se2qsD]{Nimble}: Your eldamon is especially nimble and always lands on their feet. They gain Acrobatics as an eldamon skill and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.LQw0yIMDUJJkq1nD]{Cat Fall} skill feat.
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.kS8OaKPn7I387pKt]{Self-Sufficient}: Your eldamon can handle themself and can track creatures easily. They gain Survival as an eldamon skill and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.urQZwmzg2kS53vd5]{Experienced Tracker} skill feat.
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.Pjp8l2vOwb6IUPlR]{Sneaky}: Your eldamon is always skulking around where you least expect it. They gain Stealth as an eldamon skill and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.beyw5bdA5hkQbmaG]{Terrain Stalker} skill feat.
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.H0eppEwKafPfJQ4x]{Terrifying}: Your eldamon is unfathomably terrifying in their battle form. They gain Intimidation as an eldamon skill and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ar2DUlvDK4LDcH9J]{Quick Coercion} skill feat. Like other eldamon with Intimidation as an eldamon skill, they also automatically gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xQMz6eDgX75WX2ce]{Intimidating Glare} skill feat.

Eldwalker.name: 远古行者 Eldwalker
Eldwalker.description:
你频繁地在现实中相位进出，并与艾达魔朋友保持联结，使你能够与元素合而为一，融入现实的其他状态。

  • 第一，艾达魔与元素生物会本能地感知你与艾达魔及元素的联结，这往往会为你赢得大量敬重。
  • 第二，若你使用自然（技能）来联系本地的元素灵体与维泰，并施行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7DN13ILADW2N9Z1t]{Commune} 仪式，你无需支付任何代价，且会自动获得大成功或大失败。
  • 第三，每天各一次，你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{Interplanar Teleport} 作为原始的天生法术施放，以旅行至元素位面或其他与艾达魔有关联的位面，并在使用此跨位面传送时旅行回到你离开的地点。以此方式施放时，其施法时间为1分钟，且你充当该法术的音叉。

Your extensive phasing in and out of reality and connection with your eldamon friends allows you to become one with the elements, melding into other states of reality.

  • First, eldamon and elemental creatures innately sense your connection to eldamon and the elements, which often affords you a great deal of respect.
  • Second, if you conduct the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7DN13ILADW2N9Z1t]{Commune} ritual using the Nature skill to contact local elemental spirits and vitae, you don't have to pay any cost and you automatically get a critical success.
  • Third, once per day each, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{Interplanar Teleport} as a primal innate spell to travel to the Elemental Planes or other planes associated with eldamon, and to travel back to the point you left when using this interplanar teleport. When you cast it this way, its casting time is 1 minute and you act as the tuning fork for the spell.

Expert Avatar.name: 专家化身 Expert Avatar
Expert Avatar.description:
你已将你具现化的元素力量精炼到了专家水平。你在力量攻击掷骰和力量DC方面成为专家。此外，你在用于决定这些力量的伤害、反制等级以及其他随等级提升的增益（如临时生命值和射程）时的有效等级，以及用于从元素化身专长中选择获得新的力量时的有效等级，提升至你的等级 – 5。除了常规的能力：将你已知的一个活跃力量替换为一个不超过7级的新活跃力量之外，你还从你的元素中学会一个额外的不超过5级的元素力量；你每天仍然只能准备一个活跃力量，但你可以像其他元素化身一样，在你已知的力量之间进行选择。

在14级时，你可以同时准备两套力量，并在遭遇开始时选择使用其中一套。每天，准备两套备选的元素力量（通常这意味着你准备两种备选的活跃力量，不过如果你拥有化身的反应动作（）专长，你也可以准备备选的反应性力量）。你还从你的元素中学会一个额外的不超过9级的活跃力量，以及如果你拥有（或之后获得）化身的反应动作（）专长，则再学会一个额外的不超过你最大有效等级的反应性力量。

You've refined your embodied elemental powers to an expert level. You become an expert in power attack rolls and power DCs. Additionally, your effective level for the purpose of determining their powers' damage, counteract level, and other scaling benefits (like temporary Hit Points and range) as well as for choosing new powers to gain from Elemental Avatar feats increases to your level – 5. In addition to the normal ability to swap one of the active powers you know for a new active power up to 7th level, you learn an additional elemental power from your element of up to 5th level; you can still only prepare one active power each day, but you can choose between the powers you know, like other elemental avatars.

At 14th level, you can prepare two sets of powers at once and choose which one to use at the beginning of an encounter. Each day, prepare two alternative sets of elemental powers (typically that means you prepare two alternative active powers, though you might also prepare alternative reactive powers if you have the Avatar's Reaction feat). You also learn one additional active power from your element of up to 9th level, and one additional reactive power of up to your maximum effective level if you have (or later gain) the Avatar's Reaction feat.

Twisting Element.name: 扭曲元素 Twisting Element
Twisting Element.description:
你像一条扭曲盘绕的蛇般扭转你的元素力量，避开区域内的几名盟友或无辜受害者。若你接下来使用的动作是引导一种影响区域的元素力量，你可以在该区域内指定至多两个方格不受该力量影响。若你拥有纠缠化身职业特性，你可以指定至多三个方格；若你同时拥有超越元素职业特性，你可以指定至多四个方格。

You twist your elemental power like a contorting serpent, avoiding a few of your allies or innocent victims in the area. If the next action you use is to channel an elemental power that affects an area, you can designate up to two squares in the area that are unaffected by the power. If you have the entwined avatar class feature, you can designate up to three squares, and if you also have the transcend element class feature, you can designate up to four squares.

Basic Embodiment.name: 基础化身 Basic Embodiment
Basic Embodiment.description:
你获得一个你选择的 1 级或 2 级元素化身专长。

You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level elemental avatar feat of your choice.

Elemental Tongue.name: 元素之舌 Elemental Tongue
Elemental Tongue.description:
你已经学会了说多种语言，以便与你的eldamon交流。你学习下列语言中的任意3种。在第3等级以及此后每隔两等级，你再学习其中一种语言：Aetheran, Astral, Chronan, Cryan, Jyoti, Khaotan, Luxan, Melodian, Muan, Petran, Pyric, Requian, Shadowtongue, Soman, Spirituan, Sussuran, Talican, Thalassic, Venenan, Voltan

特殊 你可以选择此专长两次，每次学习不同的语言。

You've learned how to speak a variety of languages in order to communicate with your eldamon. You learn any 3 of the following languages. At 3rd level and every two levels thereafter, you learn another of the languages: Aetheran, Astral, Chronan, Cryan, Jyoti, Khaotan, Luxan, Melodian, Muan, Petran, Pyric, Requian, Shadowtongue, Soman, Spirituan, Sussuran, Talican, Thalassic, Venenan, Voltan

Special You can take this feat twice, learning different languages each time.

Elemental Senses.name: 元素感官 Elemental Senses
Elemental Senses.description:
你与元素的联结增强了你的感官，要么为你现有的感官灌注新的特性，要么干脆赋予你全新的感官。你获得你所选元素所列出的元素感官增益。

Your connection to your element enhances your senses, either imbuing new features to your existing senses or granting you new senses altogether. You gain the elemental senses benefit listed for your element.

Enduring Shield.name: 持久护盾 Enduring Shield
Enduring Shield.description:
你可以维持你的元素护盾直到你刷新为止，让你在保持防御的同时有更大的机动空间。当你使用元素护盾时，它会持续到你刷新为止，而不是持续到你下个回合开始。

You can keep up your elemental shield until you refresh, leaving you more room to maneuver while staying defended. When you use Elemental Shield, it lasts until you refresh, instead of until the beginning of your next turn.

Nonlethal Element.name: 非致命元素 Nonlethal Element
Nonlethal Element.description:
你调节自身的元素输出，以避免彻底终结你的敌人。如果你接下来使用的下一个动作是引导一种不具有死亡或虚能（特征）的元素力量，那么该力量获得非致命（特征）。

You modulate your elemental output to hold off from finishing your foe. If the next action you use is to channel an elemental power that doesn't have the death or void trait, that power gains the nonlethal trait.

Elemental Sculptor.name: 元素塑形师 Elemental Sculptor
Elemental Sculptor.description:
你与自身元素更深层的联结使你能够将其塑造成你所意志。你因此能够产生你元素中所列出的元素塑形师效果。元素塑形师获得与你元素相对应的特征。若你将元素塑形师用于由另一名生物创造的魔法效果，你必须在对抗该效果的反制DC时成功进行一次反制检定，其调整值为你的力量DC – 10，且反制等级为你等级的一半（向上取整）。

Your deeper connection to your element allows you to sculpt it to your will. This allows you to produce the elemental sculptor effect listed in your element. Elemental Sculptor gains the trait corresponding to your element. If you use Elemental Sculptor on a magical effect created by another creature, you must succeed at a counteract check against the effect's counteract DC, with a modifier of your power DC – 10 and a counteract level of half your level rounded up.

Effusive Element.name: 洋溢的元素 Effusive Element
Effusive Element.description:
你用华丽且引人注目的元素能量与效果环绕自身，以此分散敌人的注意力。若你接下来使用的动作是引导一种元素力量，任何试图使用因引导该力量而触发的反应动作（）的生物，都会因分心而在作为该反应动作（）一部分进行的检定上承受–2环境减值（该减值也适用于作为该反应动作（）一部分所用的DC）。此外，被该力量击中的生物，或在对抗该力量的豁免中失败的生物，会对你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} 状态，直到你下个回合开始。

You surround yourself with flashy and eye-catching element energies and effects, distracting your foes. If the next action you use is to channel an elemental power, any creature that attempts to use a reaction triggered by channeling the power takes a –2 circumstance penalty to checks rolled as part of the reaction due to the distraction (this penalty applies to DCs used as part of the reaction as well). In addition, creatures you hit with the power or that fail their saving throws against the power are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} with you until the start of your next turn.

Elemental Permanence.name: 元素恒久 Elemental Permanence
Elemental Permanence.description:
每次你刷新时，你可以选择排除一个通常会持续到你刷新为止的已启用力量，使其效果继续持续，作为交换，该力量不会变为可供你再次使用的就绪状态。如果你在每次刷新时都继续选择同一个力量，你可以持续延长它，使其效果呈半永久状态，直到你刷新且选择不再延长该力量。你一次只能以这种方式延长一个已启用力量；并且当它不再属于你当前可用的力量集合时，其效果会立即结束，例如你重新准备你的力量而不再包含它，或你使用元素灵活性、无限灵活性或类似的能力切换你的力量集合而不再包含它。本专长对任何其他持续到你刷新为止的事物没有影响，例如木元素播下的植物。

Each time you Refresh, you can choose to exclude one active power that normally lasts until you Refresh, allowing its effects to continue in exchange for not becoming ready for you to use it again. If you continue to choose the same power when you Refresh, you can continue to extend it, making the effects semi-permanent until you Refresh and choose not to extend that power. You can only have one active power extended this way at a time, and its effects end immediately when it is no longer part of your currently available set of powers, for instance if you reprepare your powers to no longer include it, or if you switch your set of powers to no longer include it using Elemental Flexibility, Infinite Flexibility, or a similar ability. This feat has no effect on anything else that lasts until you refresh, such as plants sowed by the wood element.

Mitigated Weakness.name: 减轻的弱点 Mitigated Weakness
Mitigated Weakness.description:
你训练你的艾尔达兽伙伴去缓解他们天生的艾尔达兽弱点，使他们免受通常对他们造成最大伤害的元素影响。你的艾尔达兽会基于其元素，将其天生的艾尔达兽弱点从等同于其等级的数值降低为等同于其等级一半的数值。

注：将 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.o1YyyNT6DaGJTh3z]{Enhanced Resistance (Eldamon)} 特性放到你的每一只艾尔达兽上。

You train your eldamon friends to mitigate their natural eldamon weaknesses, protecting them against the elements that normally do them the most harm. Your eldamon decrease their natural eldamon weaknesses based on their element from an amount equal to their level to an amount equal to half their level.

Note: Place the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.o1YyyNT6DaGJTh3z]{Enhanced Resistance (Eldamon)} feature on each of your eldamon.

Advanced Training.name: 进阶训练 Advanced Training
Advanced Training.description:
你已将你的艾尔达兽训练到更高境界。你获得进阶训练职业特性。这意味着你的艾尔达兽对其未受训技能的熟练加值变为等同于其等级，并且你的艾尔达兽获得四个属性提升，分别加在它们四个最低的属性调整值上。这通常会将它们最低的四个调整值从 +2、+1、+0 和 –1 提升为 +3、+2、+1 和 +0。通过并肩训练，你提升的不只是你的艾尔达兽，还有你自身的能力。这使你每天可以准备三个相位三艾尔达兽，而不是两个，只要你的魅力调整值至少为 +3。

此外，为了决定它们力量的伤害、反制等级以及其他随等级成长的增益（如临时生命值与射程），以及为了决定它们可以使用哪些力量，你的有效等级提高为你的等级 – 5。

You've trained your eldamon to greater heights. You gain the advanced training class feature. This means that your eldamons' proficiency bonus to their untrained skills becomes equal to their level, and your eldamon gain four attribute boosts, one to each of their four lowest attribute modifiers. This typically increases their four lowest modifiers from +2, +1, +0, and –1 to +3, +2, +1, and +0. By training side by side, you improve your own capabilities, not just your eldamons'. This allows you to prepare to phase three eldamon each day, instead of two, as long as your Charisma modifier is at least +3.

Additionally, your effective level for the purpose of determining their powers' damage, counteract level, and other scaling benefits (like temporary Hit Points and range), as well as for determining what powers they can use, increases to your level – 5.

Flexible Refresh.name: 灵活刷新 Flexible Refresh
Flexible Refresh.description:
你已在多种方式与不同地点中练习刷新你的元素力量，并在各类不同的环境元素能量下进行，使你能够以最适合当前情境细节的最佳方式补充你的力量。你从你的元素中学会一个额外的元素力量或一个通用力量，且必须为一个刷新力量。你每天可以额外准备一个元素力量，且必须为一个刷新力量。

You've practiced refreshing your elemental powers in numerous ways and in various locations with different ambient elemental energies, allowing you to replenish your power in the best manner to suit the specifics of your current situation. You learn an additional elemental power from your element or a universal power, which must be a refresh power. You can prepare one additional elemental power each day, which must be a refresh power.

Elemental Avatar Dedication.name: 元素化身奉献 Elemental Avatar Dedication
Elemental Avatar Dedication.description:
选择一个元素化身的元素。你获得该元素的元素操控特性，并学习该元素的一个 1 级主动力量。每天，你可以准备你元素的一个主动力量，并且你可以使用该力量。你在力量攻击掷骰与力量 DC 上为受训。你不能以正常方式或通过刷新力量进行刷新行动，不过你仍会在遭遇或紧张情境结束后像其他元素化身一样自动刷新你的力量。你在用于决定其力量的伤害、反制等级以及其他成长收益（如临时生命值与射程）时的有效等级，以及用于选择要获得的新力量（通常来自元素化身专长或变体专长）时的有效等级，等于你等级的一半。例如，在 6 级时，你的有效等级为 3，因此你最多可以学习 3 级力量，你的力量将具有 2 级反制等级，并且若其造成 @Damage[1d6[untyped]] 伤害外加你每有 1 级再造成 @Damage[1d6[untyped]] 伤害，则其将造成 @Damage[4d6[untyped]] 伤害。每到一个偶数等级，你可以将你已知的一个主动力量替换为另一个不高于你有效等级的主动力量。你不会获得你所选择元素的任何其他能力或增益。

特殊 在你从元素化身变体获得另外两个专长之前，你不能选择另一个奉献专长。

Choose an elemental avatar element. You gain the elemental manipulation feature for that element, and you learn one of the element's 1st-level active powers. Each day, you can prepare one active power of your element, and you can use that power. You're trained in power attack rolls and power DCs. You can't take the Refresh activity normally or via a refresh power, though you still refresh your powers automatically after an encounter or stressful situation is over, like other elemental avatars. Your effective level for the purpose of determining their powers' damage, counteract level, and other scaling benefits (like temporary Hit Points and range), as well as for choosing new powers to gain (typically from Elemental Avatar feats or archetype feats), is equal to half your level. For instance, at 6th level, your effective level would be 3, so you could learn up to a 3rd level power, your powers would have a counteract level of 2, and if they deal @Damage[1d6[untyped]] damage plus @Damage[1d6[untyped]] damage for each level you have, they would deal @Damage[4d6[untyped]] damage. At every even level, you can replace one of the active powers you know with a different active power up to your effective level. You don't gain any of the other abilities or benefits of the element you chose.

Special You can't select another dedication feat until you have gained two other feats from the elemental avatar archetype.

Eldamon Evolution.name: 艾达蒙进化 Eldamon Evolution
Eldamon Evolution.description:
你已学会如何帮助你的艾达兽进化。你获得艾达兽进化职业特性。每只艾达兽都有进化状态，而这意味着只要你满足它们，艾达兽就会获得一个新的进化战斗形态。该进化形态获得提升的熟练度，以及对艾达兽三个最高属性调整值的属性提升，并获得一个新的特殊能力。

通过与艾达兽一起努力达到它们的进化阈值，你也开始理解自身的极限。这使你每天可以准备相位四艾达兽，而不是三只，前提是你的魅力调整值至少为+4。

此外，在用于决定它们力量的伤害、反制等级以及其他随等级提升的增益（如临时生命值与射程）时，以及用于决定它们能使用哪些力量时，你的有效等级提高为你的等级–3。

You've learned how to help your eldamon evolve. You gain the eldamon evolution class feature. Each eldamon has evolution conditions, and this means that if you meet them, the eldamon gains a new evolved battle form. This evolved form gains increased proficiencies and an attribute boost to the eldamon's three highest attribute modifiers, as well as a new special ability.

By working hard with your eldamon to reach their evolution thresholds, you come to understand your own limits as well. This allows you to prepare to phase four eldamon each day, instead of three, as long as your Charisma modifier is at least +4.

Additionally, your effective level for the purpose of determining their powers' damage, counteract level, and other scaling benefits (like temporary Hit Points and range), as well as for determining what powers they can use, increases to your level – 3.

Researcher's Insight.name: 研究者的洞见 Researcher's Insight
Researcher's Insight.description:
当你进入与退出相位时，你会捕捉到各种可能性的一瞥，从而更好地理解周围的世界。每当你使用相位艾达兽使一只受训的艾达兽相位进入，以及每当你的一只受训的艾达兽使用相位艾达兽切换为另一只受训的艾达兽时，你都可以以自由动作（）尝试一次回忆知识检定。你可以在确定回忆知识检定的结果之后再选择你的艾达兽。

As you move into and out of phase, you catch glimpses of possibilities that allow you to better understand the world around you. Whenever you use Phase Eldamon to phase in a trained eldamon, and whenever one of your trained eldamon uses Phase Eldamon to switch to another trained eldamon, you can attempt a Recall Knowledge check as a free action. You can choose your eldamon after determining the result of the Recall Knowledge check.

Disruptive Siphon.name: 扰乱性虹吸 Disruptive Siphon
Disruptive Siphon.description:
当你虹吸一种元素力量时，你会显著扰乱与你的元素相匹配的生物。当你使用虹吸元素动作时，你对具有与你的元素相关的任意特征相匹配的特征的生物造成全额伤害。

When you siphon an elemental power, you significantly disrupt creatures that match your element. When using the Siphoning Element action, you deal full damage to creatures with a trait matching any of your element's associated traits.

Elemental Throes.name: 元素阵痛 Elemental Throes
Elemental Throes.description:
触发 你被降至0生命值并将会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}（但不会死亡）

你体内蕴含着如此充沛的元素能量，以至于当你被击倒时，它必然会爆发出来。你对30尺半径的散发范围内的所有生物造成 @Damage[max(floor(@actor.level/2),7)d6[untyped]] 点与你的元素所关联的伤害类型的伤害（若你的元素具有多种伤害类型，则改为你选择其中一种伤害类型），目标需进行一次以你的力量DC为基准的 @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] 豁免。于16级时，伤害提升至8d6；于18级时，伤害提升至9d6；于20级时，伤害提升至10d6。

特殊 若你死亡，元素痉挛将会在你愿不愿意都启动，且无需花费一个自由动作（）。如果你在同一回合中先陷入昏迷，随后又在该回合稍晚死亡，则这可能导致它在同一回合内启动两次。

Trigger You are reduced to 0 Hit Points and would fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} (but not die)

You hold so much elemental energy within you that it can't help but burst out when you're laid low. You deal @Damage[max(floor(@actor.level/2),7)d6[untyped]] damage of your element's associated damage type (or one of the damage types of your choice if your element has multiple damage types) to all creatures within a 30- foot radius emanation, with a @Check[reflex|against:eldamon|basic:true] save against your power DC. At 16th level, the damage increases to 8d6, at 18th level, the damage increases to 9d6, and at 20th level, the damage increases to 10d6.

Special If you die, Elemental Throes activates whether you want it to or not, without spending a free action. This could cause it to activate twice in the same turn if you first fall unconscious and then die later that turn.

Surging Element.name: 涌动元素 Surging Element
Surging Element.description:
你产生一次突然的涌动，能够立刻修正一种元素力量。如果你接下来的下一个动作是引导一种元素力量，则该力量获得你的元素的元素涌动效果。由于你没有采取元素涌动动作，你无视其需求。

You produce a sudden surge, capable of modifying an elemental power immediately. If the next action you use is to channel an elemental power, that power gains the elemental surge effect for your element. Since you didn't take the Elemental Surge action, you ignore its requirements.

Second Calling.name: 第二次感召 Second Calling
Second Calling.description:
你成为一名eldamon训练师的感召如此强烈而复杂，以至于它包含多个支柱。再选择一个感召，并获得该感召的增益。

Your calling to become an eldamon trainer is so strong and complex that it contains multiple pillars. Choose another calling and gain that calling's benefits.

I Believe In You!.name: 我相信你！ I Believe In You!
I Believe In You!.description:
你可以利用你与艾达兽更深层的联系，尝试激励它们迈向更高的境界。当你使用“你能做到！”，你可以选择尝试进行一次 @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:20|traits:action:you-can-do-it] 检定，而非进行一次 DC 15 的交涉检定。若你如此做且获得大成功或大失败中的大成功，你的艾达兽获得 +3 环境加值，而非 +2 环境加值。若你拥有艾达兽大师职业特性，你可以改为选择尝试进行一次 @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:30|traits:action:you-can-do-it] 检定。若你如此做，你的艾达兽在失败时获得 +1 环境加值（但大成功或大失败中的大失败除外），在成功时获得 +2 环境加值，并在大成功或大失败中的大成功时获得 +4 环境加值。

You can leverage your deeper connection to your eldamon to attempt to inspire them to greater heights. When you use You Can Do It!, you can choose to attempt a @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:20|traits:action:you-can-do-it] check instead of a DC 15 Diplomacy check. If you do and you critically succeed, your eldamon gains a +3 circumstance bonus instead of a +2 circumstance bonus. If you have the eldamon master class feature, you can instead choose to attempt a @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:30|traits:action:you-can-do-it] check. If you do, your eldamon gains a +1 circumstance bonus on a failure (but not a critical failure), they gain a +2 circumstance bonus on a success, and they gain a +4 circumstance bonus on a critical success.

Elemental Flexibility.name: 元素灵活性 Elemental Flexibility
Elemental Flexibility.description:
你的元素力量极其灵活，使你能够与体内与灵魂中的艾达蒙调谐，从而随时改变你可用的力量。通过与体内的艾达蒙调谐10分钟，你便会为当天重新准备你的元素力量，从你已知的力量中选择一套新的力量，就像你在每日准备期间进行的正常选择一样。

Your elemental power is incredibly flexible, allowing you to attune with the eldamon within your body and soul to change up your available powers on the fly. By attuning with the eldamon inside you for 10 minutes, you reprepare your elemental powers for the day, choosing a new set of powers from the powers you know, just like your normal selection during your daily preparations.

Tag Team Ultimate.name: 终极双人连携 Tag Team Ultimate
Tag Team Ultimate.description:
有时你会召唤你艾尔达兽的终极力量，却发现敌人过于强大。在这种情况下，你必须超越自身极限，并在尚未从第一次的消耗中恢复之前，再引出另一份终极力量。每天一次，当你的一只艾尔达兽使用其终极力量后，你可以在未满1小时之前使用另一只艾尔达兽的终极力量，尽管通常你需要等待1小时后，你的任意艾尔达兽才能再次使用终极力量。当你以这种方式使用第二次终极力量时，它不会重置你再次使用终极力量的计数；你的艾尔达兽仍然可以在你的艾尔达兽第一次使用终极力量后的1小时再使用另一项终极力量。

Sometimes you call down your eldamon's ultimate power, only to find the foe is too strong. In those cases, you have to surpass your own limits and draw forth another ultimate power before you've recovered from the first. Once per day, after one of your eldamon uses their ultimate power, you can use another eldamon's ultimate power before 1 hour has passed, even though normally you need to wait 1 hour before any of your eldamon uses an ultimate power again. When you use a second ultimate power in this way, it doesn't reset your count toward using an ultimate power again; your eldamon can still use another ultimate power 1 hour after your eldamon used the first one.

Reactive Mastery.name: 反应精通 Reactive Mastery
Reactive Mastery.description:
你总是在观察合适的时机，以便再插入一个元素力量。这使你形成了一套苛刻的瞬间训练方案，提升了你对反应力量的亲和力。因此，你可以准备数个反应力量，以便随时应对任何情况。你从你的元素中学习一个额外的元素力量，或学习一个通用力量，但其必须是反应力量。你每天可以额外准备一个元素力量，但其必须是反应力量。

You're always watching for the right moment to slip in another elemental power. This has led you to develop a demanding regimen of split-second training, which has increased your affinity for reactive powers. As a result, you can prepare several reactive powers so that you can be ready to respond to any situation. You learn an additional elemental power from your element or a universal power, which must be a reactive power. You can prepare one additional elemental power each day, which must be a reactive power.

Retract Tether.name: 收回 系绳 Retract Tether
Retract Tether.description:
需求你处于相位移出状态，你的一只受训eldamon处于相位移入状态，并且你没有使用Untether来移除你与相位移入的eldamon之间的系绳。

你训练自己与eldamon，以便在它们相位移入时利用你们之间的系绳，将限制化为优势，因为eldamon会立刻反弹回到你的位置。你的相位移入eldamon沿着其形而上的系绳移动到与你当前所在位置相邻的一个空间。由于它不会穿过任何中间的空间，因此不会触发基于穿过这些空间进行移动的反应动作（），但仍会触发基于起始与终止空间中的移动的反应动作（）。

特殊当你选择此专长时，你所有受训的eldamon获得使用@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.actions.Item.j51m07Twc5azHFw1]{收回系绳}动作的能力，而不是你获得使用该专长的能力。

Requirements You are phased out, one of your trained eldamon is phased in, and you are not using Untether to remove the tether with your phased in eldamon.

You train yourself and your eldamon in order to take advantage of the tether between the two of you while they're phased in, turning a restriction into an advantage, as the eldamon instantly rebounds back to your location. Your phased in eldamon moves to a space adjacent to your current position by traveling along its metaphysical tether. Since it doesn't pass through any intervening spaces, it doesn't trigger reactions based on moving through those spaces, though it still triggers reactions based on movement in the initial and final spaces.

Special When you take this feat, all of your trained eldamon gain the ability to use the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.actions.Item.j51m07Twc5azHFw1]{Retract Tether} action, rather than you gaining the ability to use the feat.

Deep Transcendence.name: 深度超越 Deep Transcendence
Deep Transcendence.description:
你超凡的元素能量比普通的元素化身更深地贯穿你的身体、心智、生命力与灵魂，开启了奇异的元素通路与连接。这赋予你许多额外的力量，大多数人会认为这对你的元素而言不同寻常。你从你在获得超越元素职业特性时所选择的第二元素的力量列表中，选择并学习四个元素力量。其中第一个力量必须为3级或更低，第二个必须为7级或更低，第三个必须为11级或更低，最后一个必须为15级或更低。与您从超越元素职业特性中学到的力量一样，这些会成为你元素的力量，但除此之外，这些力量仍具有其正常效果。

Your transcendent elemental energies run deeper through your body, mind, life force, and soul than a normal elemental avatar, opening strange elemental pathways and connections. This grants you numerous additional powers that most would consider unusual for your element. You learn four elemental powers chosen from the list of the second element you selected when you gained the transcend element class feature. The first of those powers must be 3rd level or lower, the second one must be 7th level or lower, the third must be 11th level or lower, and the last power must be 15th level or lower. Like the powers you learned from the transcend element class feature, these become powers of your element, though otherwise the powers have their normal effects.

Elemental Reflexes.name: 元素反射 Elemental Reflexes
Elemental Reflexes.description:
你体内的艾达蒙帮助你应对周围的战斗，使你能更轻松地运用你的反应性力量。在你每个回合开始时，你获得一个额外的反应动作（），你只能用它来施展你的反应性元素力量。

The eldamon within you helps you respond to the battle around you, allowing you to use your reactive powers more easily. At the start of each of your turns, you gain an additional reaction, which you can only use for your reactive elemental powers.

Incarnate Eldamon.name: 化身长老魔兽 Incarnate Eldamon
Incarnate Eldamon.description:
频率 每分钟一次

你短暂地具现一只艾达兽，从而在不切换相位的情况下使用其力量，不过这样做需要消耗大量能量。

具现艾达兽在某种程度上类似于召唤一个生物，但在魔法运作方式上存在一些显著差异。首先，它并不会召唤出一个无名的、泛用的生物仿制品在你维持该效果期间充当你的仆从。相反，它会召唤你的一只艾达兽持续 2 轮，使你的艾达兽得以蓄力并使用 1 个元素力量。在你具现它们的那个回合，你的艾达兽会在你相邻位置部分相位进入，并进行“踏步”“疾走”，或执行与其拥有的一种移动类型相对应的另一个动作（例如水属性艾达兽的游泳，或空气属性艾达兽的飞行）。在你下个回合结束时，该艾达兽花费两个动作来使用你选择的、它的两个动作力量之一。随后具现结束，你的艾达兽相位退出。

由于具现而短暂部分相位进入时，你的艾达兽并非完全存在。在此状态下，除上述动作外，它们不能执行任何其他动作；但作为此限制的交换，它们也不会成为任何效果的目标或受到其伤害，除非该效果能够终止或扰乱法术效果（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{解除魔法}）。那些即使能伤害完全相位退出的艾达兽的假想效果，仍然可以影响被具现的艾达兽，但通常来说，一个相位进入的生物无法做到能实现这一点的事情。部分相位进入时，你的艾达兽不够凝实，无法阻挡其他生物的移动，就像艾达兽相位退出时一样。

由于这些限制，以及与完整相位相比对艾达兽造成的巨大负荷，许多艾达兽训练师不会学习如何进行具现。掌握此技者会用它来快速转向：在本回合具现一只艾达兽，并在下个回合让另一只艾达兽相位进入。具现对多职业艾达兽训练师也至关重要，因为他们无法维持完整相位。

以这种方式具现艾达兽后，该艾达兽需要休息，并且在 1 分钟内无法通过 Phase Eldamon 相位进入。

Frequency once per minute

You briefly incarnate an eldamon in order to use its powers without swapping phase, though doing so requires a lot of energy.

Incarnating an eldamon is somewhat parallel to summoning a creature, but there are some significant differences involved in the way the magic works. First, it doesn't conjure a generic nameless facsimile of a creature to be your minion as long as you Sustain the effect. Instead, it conjures one of your eldamon for 2 rounds, allowing your eldamon to charge up and use one elemental power. On the turn you incarnate them, your eldamon partially phases in adjacent to you and Steps, Strides, or takes another action corresponding to a type of movement it has (such as Swim for a water eldamon or Fly for an air eldamon). At the end of your next turn, the eldamon spends two actions to use one of their two-action powers of your choice. The incarnation then ends and your eldamon phases out.

While partially phased in briefly due to an incarnation, your eldamon isn't fully present. In this state, they can't take any other actions except the ones mentioned above, but in exchange for this restriction, they also can't be targeted or harmed by any effects except those that would be able to end or disrupt a spell effect (such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic}). Hypothetical effects that can harm even a fully phased-out eldamon can still affect an incarnated eldamon, but normally there's nothing a phased-in creature can do that would accomplish that. While partially phased in, your eldamon isn't solid enough to block other creatures' movement, just like when the eldamon is phased out.

Due to the restrictions and the intense strain on the eldamon compared to a full phase, many eldamon trainers don't learn how to perform an incarnation. Those that do so use it to quickly pivot by incarnating one eldamon and then phasing in another on their next turn. Incarnation is also crucial for multiclass eldamon trainers, since they can't sustain a full phase.

After incarnating the eldamon in this way, the eldamon needs to rest, and it can't phase in with Phase Eldamon for 1 minute.

Refreshing Phase Shift.name: 刷新相位转移 Refreshing Phase Shift
Refreshing Phase Shift.description:
你已训练你的eldamon在替换另一只eldamon上场时使用它们的刷新力量。当你的处于相位中的eldamon使用相位Eldamon替换另一只eldamon时，你可以选择正在相位退出的原eldamon或正在相位进入的新eldamon，将其刷新力量作为相位Eldamon行动的一部分使用。提醒一下，这对Sudden Switch不起作用，因为使用相位Eldamon的不是你的eldamon。

You've trained your eldamon to use their refresh powers when they switch in for another eldamon. When your phased in eldamon uses Phase Eldamon to switch for another eldamon, your choice of the original eldamon phasing out or the new eldamon that phases in can use its refresh power as part of the Phase Eldamon activity. As a reminder, this doesn't work with Sudden Switch, since your eldamon isn't the one using Phase Eldamon.

Twin Ultimate.name: 双重终极 Twin Ultimate
Twin Ultimate.description:
你能够容纳多个代表终极力量的元素式样，使你拥有更多选择并能更频繁地使用它们。你学会一个你所属元素的额外终极元素力量。你可以同时准备它们，并且每天一次，在你使用了其中一个终极力量之后，你可以在1小时过去之前使用另一个，即使通常你需要等待1小时才能再次使用任何终极力量。以这种方式使用第二个终极力量时，它不会重置你再次使用终极力量的计数；你仍然可以在使用第一个终极力量后的1小时再使用另一个终极力量。

You are able to contain multiple elemental patterns representing ultimate powers, allowing you to have more options and use them more often. You learn an additional ultimate elemental power of your element. You can prepare both of them, and once per day, after you've used one of your ultimate powers, you can use the other one before 1 hour has passed, even though normally you need to wait 1 hour before using any ultimate powers again. When you use a second ultimate power in this way, it doesn't reset your count toward using an ultimate power again; you can still use another ultimate power 1 hour after you used the first one.

Avatar's Reaction.name: 化身的反应 Avatar's Reaction
Avatar's Reaction.description:
你学会如何使用你的元素的反应动作（）。你获得你的元素的1级反应力量，并且你每天可以准备一个反应力量。

You learn how to use your element's reactions. You gain the 1st level reactive power of your element, and you can prepare one reactive power each day.

Share Senses.name: 共享感官 Share Senses
Share Senses.description:
当你的艾达蒙借用你的相位时，你会借用他们的感官。尽管你处于相位移出状态且仍然无法行动（意味着你无法花费动作来@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索}），但这使你能够在你的艾达蒙能感知到你无法感知的事物时，被动地从他们所有的感官中收集感官信息。例如，如果你的艾达蒙能看到拐角处的情况，你就能看到他们所见之物。

When your eldamon borrow your phase, you borrow their senses. Though you're phased out and still can't act (meaning you can't spend actions to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek}), this allows you to passively gather sensory information from all of your eldamon's senses when they can sense something you can't. For instance, if your eldamon can see around a corner, you can see what they see.

Enhanced Familiar.name: 强化魔宠 Enhanced Familiar
Enhanced Familiar.description:
Eldamon 训练师 你向你的魔宠注入额外的元素能量。你每天可以选择四项魔宠或大师能力，而不是两项。

元素化身 你从体内的eldamon中向你的魔宠注入额外的元素能量。你每天可以选择四项魔宠或大师能力，而不是两项。

Eldamon Trainer You infuse your familiar with additional elemental energy. You can select four familiar or master abilities each day, instead of two.

Elemental Avatar You infuse your familiar with additional elemental energy from the eldamon within you. You can select four familiar or master abilities each day, instead of two.

Master Avatar.name: 主化身 Master Avatar
Master Avatar.description:
你已将你所具现的元素力量精通到相当程度，正逐步接近完整的化身。你成为力量攻击掷骰与力量DC的大师。此外，为了决定这些力量的伤害、反制等级以及其他成长收益（如临时生命值与射程），以及为了从元素化身专长中选择要获得的新力量，你的有效等级提升为你的等级 – 3。除了通常能够将你已知的一项已激活力量替换为一项最高至15级的新已激活力量之外，你还从你的元素中习得一项最高至13级的元素力量。

You've mastered your embodied elemental powers to an extent, approaching a full avatar. You become a master in power attack rolls and power DCs. Additionally, your effective level for the purpose of determining their powers' damage, counteract level, and other scaling benefits (like temporary Hit Points and range), as well as for choosing new powers to gain from Elemental Avatar feats, increases to your level – 3. In addition to the normal ability to swap one of the active powers you know for a new active power up to 15th level, you learn an elemental power from your element of up to 13th level.

Double Team.name: 双人夹击 Double Team
Double Team.description:
2 或 3

频率 每小时一次

需求 你处于相位移出状态且你的一名受训 eldamon 处于相位移入状态；你和你的 eldamon 在本回合尚未行动。

你掌握了一种困难的技巧，使你能够短暂地让第二只 eldamon 相位移入以使用一次力量。第二只 eldamon 会在你当前相位移入的 eldamon 身旁相位移入，并使用一个主动力量，其动作数等同于你在 Double Team 上花费的动作数。随后它会相位移出。本回合两只 eldamon 都不能使用元素涌动。即使你处于相位移出状态，你也可以使用此动作，尽管你通常在相位移出状态下无法行动。

2 or 3

Frequency once per hour

Requirements You are phased out and one of your trained eldamon is phased in; you and your eldamon haven't acted yet this turn.

You've mastered a difficult technique, allowing you to briefly phase in a second eldamon to use a single power. A second eldamon phases in next to your currently phased in eldamon and uses a single active power with a number of actions matching the number of actions you spent on Double Team. It then phases out. Neither eldamon can use an elemental surge this turn. You can use this action even when you're phased out, even though you normally can't act when phased out.

Clinging Element.name: 黏附元素 Clinging Element
Clinging Element.description:
你改变一种元素力量，使视觉显现中炫目的元素能量黏附在你的敌人身上。若你接下来使用的下一个动作是引导一种元素力量，则任何被该元素力量伤害的敌人也会因黏附的元素能量而被@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{显映的}，持续至你下个回合结束。若你对该敌人造成重击，或该敌人对该力量的豁免大失败，则其改为被显映的持续1分钟，并且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}持续1轮。可见的生物在以此方式被显映的期间不能处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。若这些生物处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}，则其在被黏附的元素能量显映的期间仅为隐蔽，而非处于未被察觉或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{躲藏}。
