You alter an elemental power causing the flashy elemental energies from the visual manifestations to cling to your foes. If the next action you use is to channel an elemental power, any foe damaged by the elemental power is also @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned} by clinging elemental energies until the end of your next turn. If you critically hit the foe or the foe critically failed their save against the power, they're limned for 1 minute and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round instead. Visible creatures can't be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} while limned in this way. If the creatures are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, they are only concealed while limned by clinging elemental energies, rather than being undetected or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}.

Emergency Phase.name: 紧急相位 Emergency Phase
Emergency Phase.description:
需求 你已相位移出，你的一只受训eldamon已相位移入，并且你能够相位Eldamon

触发 你已相位移入的eldamon在一次豁免中失败或大失败。

你迅速将你的eldamon相位移出，并让自己相位移入，利用这次转换来尝试扰乱你的eldamon即将发生的灾害。重骰触发的豁免并使用两次结果中较好的那个。你已相位移入的eldamon相位移出，而你相位移入。即使你已相位移出，你也可以使用这个自由动作（），尽管你通常在相位移出时无法行动。

Requirements You are phased out, one of your trained eldamon is phased in, and you are able to Phase Eldamon

Trigger Your phased in eldamon fails or critically fails a saving throw.

You quickly phase your eldamon out and phase yourself back in, using the shift to attempt to disrupt your eldamon's impending disaster. Reroll the triggering saving throw and use the better of the two results. Your phased in eldamon phases out and you phase back in. You can use this free action even when you're phased out, even though you normally can't act when phased out.

Shiny Eldamon.name: 闪亮埃尔达蒙 Shiny Eldamon
Shiny Eldamon.description:
当它们与你共享你的相位时，你的艾尔达兽会以一种特定的颜色散发辉光，代表你内在的灵体。根据你的个性决定该颜色。艾尔达兽的辉光像火把一样照亮它们周围的区域（20英尺的明亮光照，以及另外20英尺的昏暗光照）。当你或你的艾尔达兽进行相位艾尔达兽时，你可以选择让你的艾尔达兽不发出辉光，而黑暗艾尔达兽永远不会发出辉光。若该艾尔达兽已经会发出辉光（例如大多数火与光艾尔达兽），并且你选择叠加来自该专长的辉光，则它们的明亮光照与昏暗光照的区域各自再扩大20英尺。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.jJfM0eKKVL8wpOt8]{效果: 闪耀艾尔达兽}

While they are sharing your phase, your eldamon glow with a specific color that represents your inner spirit. Decide the color based on your personality. The eldamons' glow illuminates the area around them like a torch (20 feet of bright light and another 20 feet of dim light). When you or your eldamon Phase Eldamon, you can choose for your eldamon not to glow, and darkness eldamon never glow. If the eldamon already glows (such as most fire and light eldamon), if you choose to add the glow from this feat, the area of their bright light and dim light each expand by 20 feet.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.jJfM0eKKVL8wpOt8]{Effect: Shiny Eldamon}

Enhanced Resistance (Elemental Avatar).name: 强化抗力（元素化身） Enhanced Resistance (Elemental Avatar)
Enhanced Resistance (Elemental Avatar).description:
你的元素抗力格外强大，因为你在身体与精神上都更加接近你体内的eldamon。若【元素抗力】赋予你的元素效果使你获得对特定伤害类型（或带有特定特征的效果所造成的伤害）的抗力，且其数值等于你等级的一半，则将这些抗力改为等于你的等级。

Your elemental resistance is especially strong, as you become physically and spiritually closer to the eldamon within you. If your element's effects from Elemental Resistance grant you resistance to certain damage types (or damage from effects with certain traits) equal to half your level, increase those resistances to be equal to your level instead.

Avatar Form.name: 化身形态 Avatar Form
Avatar Form.description:
你将寄居在你灵魂中的艾尔达蒙的特性注入你的身体，同时你以纯粹的元素能量增大你的体型，将你转化为介于你原本形态与所化身的艾尔达蒙之间的巨大混合体。若你的体型通常小于大型（体型），你将成长为大型（体型）；若你的触及通常小于10尺，你的触及提高至10尺。你的大型（体型）形态在外形上仍大致为类人，但会呈现与你体内艾尔达蒙相呼应的显著特征，例如若你体内的艾尔达蒙是一只松鼠灰烬（squirrelash），则会获得耳朵、松鼠脸，或蓬松的燃烧尾巴。这一转化持续，直到你再次使用化身形态以回到你平常的形态。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.9R6V87boJshn3Gie]{效果：化身形态}

You infuse your body with the features of the eldamon residing within your soul, and at the same time, you increase your size with pure elemental energy, transforming you into an enormous hybrid between your original form and the eldamon you embody. You grow to Large size, if your size is normally smaller than Large, and your reach increases to 10 feet if it's normally less than 10 feet. Your Large form is still roughly humanoid in shape but bears distinctive features paralleling the eldamon within you, such as gaining ears, a squirrel face, or a bushy flaming tail if the eldamon within you is a squirrelash. This transformation lasts until you use Avatar Form again to return to your usual form.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.9R6V87boJshn3Gie]{Effect: Avatar Form}

Enhanced Resistance (Eldamon Trainer).name: 强化抗力（Eldamon 训练师） Enhanced Resistance (Eldamon Trainer)
Enhanced Resistance (Eldamon Trainer).description:
你训练你的艾达兽伙伴来强化它们天生的艾达兽抗力，使它们更难被自身的元素过载，或被它们已经抗力的元素所克制。你的艾达兽会根据其元素提升它们天生的艾达兽抗力，从等于其等级的数值提升为等于其等级的一点五倍的数值，在2级时从抗力3开始，并在20级时以抗力30结束。

注意：将 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.B3OlVFaGFavlGEWe]{Enhanced Resistance (Eldamon)} 特性放置在你的每一只艾达兽身上

You train your eldamon friends to enhance their natural eldamon resistances, making it harder to overload them with their own element or overcome them with an elemental they already resist. Your eldamon increase their natural eldamon resistances based on their element from an amount equal to their level to an amount equal to one and a half times their level, starting at resistance 3 at 2nd level and ending at resistance 30 at 20th level.

Note: Place the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.effects.Item.B3OlVFaGFavlGEWe]{Enhanced Resistance (Eldamon)} feature on each of your eldamon

Rejuvenating Refresh.name: 复苏的刷新 Rejuvenating Refresh
Rejuvenating Refresh.description:
当你的eldamon刷新他们的元素力量时，你可以承受他们的一些伤害来使其恢复并刷新他们。每当你的一个已相位进入的eldamon使用一个刷新力量时，你可以选择失去一定数量的生命值，上限为你等级的两倍或比你当前生命值少1点，取较小者。你的eldamon恢复等量的生命值。

When your eldamon refreshes their elemental powers, you can take some of their damage to rejuvenate and refresh them. Whenever one of your phased in eldamon uses a refresh power, you can choose to lose a number of Hit Points up to twice your level or 1 less than your current Hit Points, whichever is less. Your eldamon recovers that many Hit Points.

Unbound Surge.name: 无缚涌动 Unbound Surge
Unbound Surge.description:
你的艾达魔能够无限制地涌动，使其能够轻松地将他们的元素力量与不受控制的涌动结合在一起。你的艾达魔可以在同一回合中，将元素涌动动作与一个元素力量一起使用，无视通常阻止他们这样做的限制。

Your eldamon can surge without limits, allowing them to combine their elemental powers together with uncontrolled surges with ease. Your eldamon can use the Elemental Surge action on the same turn as an elemental power, ignoring the usual restrictions preventing them from doing so.
